description_long: This traffic barricade consists of a rectangular horizontal panel with alternating black and yellow diagonal stripes, mounted atop a lightweight metal frame. The panel is visually striking, designed to catch attention and signal caution or restricted access. The frame is constructed from thin, tubular metal rods, forming a triangular support structure on each side, connected by crossbars for stability. The barricade stands on two angled legs, with additional bracing rods for reinforcement. The striped panel appears to be made of a durable plastic or composite material, while the frame is likely steel or aluminum. There are no visible lights, signage, or attachment fixtures beyond the basic frame and striped panel.
description: A lightweight traffic barricade with a black and yellow striped panel mounted on a metal frame with angled support legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the striped panel and the triangular support legs.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the narrow profile of the panel and the triangular arrangement of the support frame.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the striped panel and the angled support structure.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the thinness of the panel and the depth of the triangular support frame.
attribute_reflective_striping_pattern: Diagonal black and yellow stripes, alternating, medium width, repeated across the full panel.
